ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies_shows" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie or show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie or show */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the content (e.g., movie, show) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie or show was released */,
  "age_certification" TEXT /* Age certification of the movie or show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie or show in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie or show */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie or show was produced */,
  "seasons" INTEGER /* Number of seasons for a show (null for movies) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Directors of the movie or show */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie or show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the movie or show */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imdb_ratings" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie or show (foreign key) */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie or show */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDb score of the movie or show */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDb votes for the movie or show */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content manager, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user Engagement" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "movie_show_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the movie or show */,
  "watch_time" INTEGER /* Total watch time in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* User-rated score for the movie or show */,
  "review" TEXT /* User review of the movie or show */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "movie_show_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the movie or show */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team involved in the collaboration (e.g., content acquisition, marketing, customer support) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_movie_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_show_id") REFERENCES movies_shows ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_show_genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "movie_show_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the movie or show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_show_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_show_genres_movie_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_show_id") REFERENCES movies_shows ("id")
)
